No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for pro hac vice admission of Laura B. De La Cruz is granted. Proposed order submitted. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF EUGENE TRACY'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling: Plaintiff Eugene Tracy's motion for the pro hac vice admission of Laura De La Cruz is denied without prejudice due to failing to comply with the requirements of CRC 9.40(d). Judge: Harold E. Kahn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/HEK)

No appearances.
